system.description:
Discipline: Neigong
Skill: Meditation TN 7 (and special)
Type: Normal
Qi: 5

You enter a deep meditative stance, blue energy coursing down your arms as they turn into solid stone. Spend two rounds to make a Meditation Skill roll against TN 7. On a Success your fists and arms become solid stone, giving you a +2 bonus to Parry, and causing any Arm Strike you make to do 5 Extra Wounds. The effect lasts for 2 rounds per Rank of Neigong. On a failure your arms still turn to stone but become too heavy and immobile to function. Cathartic: In addition to the above effects, you can point and unleash a flow of jagged rocks from your hands at your foes. This reaches up to 20 feet and strikes everyone in its ten-foot wide path (Meditation against Evade), doing 3 automatic Wounds to everyone struck.
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 3: Kung Fu Techniques
system.catharticEffect: In addition to the above effects, you can point and unleash a flow of jagged rocks from your hands at your foes. This reaches up to 20 feet and strikes everyone in its ten-foot wide path (Meditation against Evade), doing 3 automatic Wounds to everyone struck.
